summary: Tested ImportFixtures admin UI feature. Found critical bug: ImportFixtures section not rendering for national league with DRAFT matchday despite conditions being met. Admin console basic elements (league selector, matchday selector, NAZIONALE badge, GIORNATE, PARTITE sections) work correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 502 Bad Gateway (expected - API-Football key suspended)
Returns 502 Bad Gateway (expected - API-Football key suspended)

ui_bugs.issue: ImportFixtures section not rendering for national league with DRAFT matchday. Condition `selectedLeague._is_national && canEditMatches` failing despite both conditions appearing true.
ui_bugs.details: Verified: National league is selected (NAZIONALE badge visible), DRAFT matchday selected (BOZZA badge visible), PARTITE section with Aggiungi button visible. But IMPORTA PARTITE REALI section missing after PARTITE section.

action_items: CRITICAL: Debug why ImportFixtures component not rendering for national league + DRAFT matchday
Check if selectedLeague._is_national is correctly evaluated when rendering
Check if token is null causing the component to fail silently (line 674: token!)
Add console.log in admin/index.tsx to debug: `console.log('ImportFixtures condition:', {_is_national: selectedLeague?._is_national, canEditMatches, token: !!token});`
Test by manually setting selectedLeague in browser devtools to verify _is_national property
critical_code_review_comments: ImportFixtures render condition (line 668) may be failing because token from useAuth() is null
The token! assertion on line 674 would cause issues if token is actually null
Consider adding explicit null check: `selectedLeague?._is_national && canEditMatches && token && (`
seed_data_creation: Giornata 15 with DRAFT status exists for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: ImportFixtures component exists at /app/frontend/app/admin/ImportFixtures.tsx. It's imported in /app/frontend/app/admin/index.tsx line 19. The rendering condition is on line 668. All admin console elements work EXCEPT the ImportFixtures section which should appear after PARTITE section for national league + editable matchday. Use admin@fantapronostic.com / admin123 to login. Authentication works but needs correct localStorage keys: 'access_token', 'refresh_token', 'user'.

reproduction_steps: 3. Lega Nazionale FantaPronostic is auto-selected (with NAZIONALE badge)
4. Open matchday selector and select a matchday with BOZZA (DRAFT) status
5. Observe: PARTITE section shows but no IMPORTA PARTITE REALI section below it
rca_of_the_issue.expected_behavior: IMPORTA PARTITE REALI collapsible section should appear after PARTITE section
rca_of_the_issue.actual_behavior: Section does not appear at all
potential_root_causes: 1. selectedLeague._is_national property not being recognized in render condition
2. token from useAuth() is null during render
4. canEditMatches evaluating to false despite DRAFT status
rca_of_the_issue.suggested_fix: Add debug logging to verify values: console.log('Import condition:', {isNational: selectedLeague?._is_national, canEditMatches, hasToken: !!token}); before line 668
